summary.short_rationale: AI_Grabli is overlap-heavy in coding-agent coverage, but adds a clean high-value gap for retrieval-quality / embedding-less RAG and a useful supporting signal around logprobs-based LLM classification.
summary.strongest_argument_for: The passport and source spot-check show distinctive practical RAG failure analysis: embeddings vs factual relevance, logical operators, aggregation, tables, LLM page filtering, large-context retrieval, and source traceability.
summary.strongest_argument_against: Two of four candidate cells are likely duplicates against already accepted coding-agent experts, and one additional eval/reasoning-control cell still needs probe before being treated as strong standalone expansion.

accepted_basis_cells.interpretation: clean matrix gap for practical retrieval-quality improvement, embedding-less RAG, LLM page filtering, large-context retrieval, and source traceability

probe_or_supporting_cells.interpretation: useful logprobs/thresholds LLM-classification angle; should be probed before counting as strong standalone expansion

duplicate_or_supporting_cells.interpretation: already covered as strong multi-source coding-agent workflow coverage
already covered as strong multi-source tool-choice coverage

good_fit: embedding-less RAG and LLM-first retrieval alternatives
large-context retrieval and LLM page filtering
logprobs and thresholds for LLM classification
AI-engineering failure patterns and anti-hype practical lessons
poor_fit: business adoption or executive AI strategy
primary Claude Code / Codex tool-choice routing

risk_notes: Two of four candidate cells are likely duplicates.
The strongest new value is concentrated in one clean retrieval-quality cell.
LLM-first retrieval can be cost-sensitive at large scale.
The logprobs/eval cell should be probed before production routing weight is raised.
recommended_manifest_caveat: accepted for retrieval-quality / embedding-less RAG and practical AI-engineering failure analysis; coding-agent coverage overlaps existing experts, avoid broad duplicate routing

probe_shape: 2 RAG failure / retrieval-quality queries against Refat and Air
1 embedding-less RAG vs hybrid/vector retrieval query
1 coding-agent workflow query where AI_Grabli should be supporting
